metadata.description: Polygon first-responder toolkit distributed as a Claude Code plugin. Ships skills for FAQ retrieval over bundled docs, Bor/Heimdall-v2 upgrade summaries, live block investigation (RPC + matplotlib), Datadog-backed network health, and sPOL/AggLayer coverage.

plugins.name: polygon-firstresponders
